arabic: وَعَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «سَيِّدُ إِدَامِكُمُ الْمِلْحُ» . رَوَاهُ ابْنُ مَاجَهْ

english.text:
Anas b. Malik reported God’s messenger as saying, “The lord of your condiment is salt.”*
*Probably meaning that salt is necessary to make food palatable, while other condiments are extras.

Ibn Majah transmitted it.
